note: Created directly in doing/in-progress. Tier-family shared-dep uninstall bug found via user's LTX High+Balanced uninstall leaving ~19GB stranded (library bars 45%/37% instead of ~5%). Root = _localSharedDepsMap per-dep on-disk protection is circular for tier families. Fix option C. Twin-check remote path.

Broadened to UMBRELLA card (user request: all related Model-Library dep/download bugs in ONE card). Bug 1 (tier-family uninstall) FIXED + tested, awaiting live verify. Bug 2 (ResumableDownloader corrupts 25GB LTX transformer across stall/Pause-Resume -> SHA256 mismatch) DIAGNOSED: R2 source verified perfect via curl (hash matches registry), corruption is app resume-path only; NOT a hash-recompute problem. Bug 3 (partial-install bar % inflated ~94 vs true ~56; nodes already excluded MPI-231, queued-only denominator is the cause) OBSERVED. Sequence: install Balanced single-stream (no pause) -> verify Bug1 uninstall -> then Bug2 -> Bug3.

BUG 1 FIRST FIX FAILED LIVE. User installed Balanced (single-stream, clean, hash-verified) then uninstalled -> log 'uninstall ltx-23-balanced: removed 0, kept 9 shared', toast 'all files shared with other models or required by engine', Balanced still shows INSTALLED. ROOT of the regression: my mid-install protection loop gated on depJob.refCount>0, but refCount stays >0 AFTER an install completes (only decremented on uninstall/disk-full rollback). So every just-installed dep was protected -> uninstall no-op. SECOND FIX: gate the in-flight loop on depJob.status==='downloading'||'queued' (a live download), NOT refCount. The whole-model gate (entry.installed!==true) is correct — verified localModelsCheck reports BOTH LTX tiers installed=false (High missing bf16, Balanced missing mxfp8 because resolveFullUniverse is NOT arch-filtered and carries both arch transformers). Added regression test (status=complete+refCount>0 must NOT protect); all 5 assertions pass. NEEDS SERVER RESTART to load. NOTE for later: resolveFullUniverse returning both arch variants means the guard never sees a usable tier as 'installed' — fine for delete-more, but revisit if it causes over-deletion of a genuinely-installed sibling.

BUG 1 LIVE-VERIFIED FIXED: log 'uninstall ltx-23-balanced: removed 9, kept 0 shared' after server restart with the status-gate fix; ~45GB freed, both LTX bars 0%, 6 installed. BUG 3 (bar accuracy) IMPLEMENTED as option A: _computePartial in MpiModelManager.js now excludes deps owned by an already-installed OTHER model (union of resolveFullUniverse over installed MODELS) from BOTH sides of the partial ratio. Root of the confusing %s: SDXL '1%' = shared 4x-NMKD upscaler (67MB) on disk; PiD '4%' = 2 shared VAEs (vae-flux-ae 335MB + vae-qwen-image 254MB) owned by Krea2. After exclusion, simulated on real dep data: sdxl-realistic/nvidia-pid/ltx-23/ltx-23-balanced ALL -> 0%. Frontend-only change -> needs renderer reload (window refresh), NOT a server restart. LEFTOVER: uninstall left an empty G:/CubricModels/loras/ltx-2.3/id-lora-talkvid/ dir shell (file trashed, dir not cleaned) — minor, cleanEmptyDirs may not recurse nested lora subdir.

BUG 3 refinement: after excluding shared deps the bar still rendered a 0% track (ugly) because _computePartial returned hasPartialProgress:true with progress:0 whenever a model's own dep existed in the registry but wasn't on disk (total>0 && !allInstalled, downloaded=0). Added downloaded>0 gate: a partial bar only draws when some of THIS model's own bytes are actually on disk; otherwise _tileState falls through to the 'Install' chip (no bar). Genuine interrupted partials still show. Unit test: 0-downloaded->no bar, real partial->bar, all-installed->no partial (PASS). Frontend-only -> renderer reload.

BUG 3 stubborn-LTX fix: images went to Install chip but both LTX tiers still drew a 0% bar. Cause: ComfyUI-LTXVideo (custom_nodes, 70MB) stays on disk after uninstall and is NOT owned by any installed model, so it wasn't excluded -> downloaded=70MB>0 -> bar. Fix: _computePartial now also excludes dep.type==='custom_nodes' (work-not-bytes), same rule the active-download bar already applies (_byteRatioExcludingNodes, MPI-231). Verified on real deps: sdxl-realistic/nvidia-pid/ltx-23/ltx-23-balanced ALL hasPartialProgress=false -> Install chip, no bar. Frontend-only -> renderer reload.

BUG 2 FIXED via full resume purge (user chose Cancel-only, RunPod-style). Root: NDH resumeFromFile sends Range: bytes=<n>- on a file opened append-mode; when R2/Cloudflare answers 200 (full body) not 206, it appends the WHOLE file onto the partial -> SHA256 mismatch (the 25GB LTX transformer corruption). Resume was for the old parallel model + lost value once installs queue (MPI-184). REMOVED: download() resumable branch (now always scrub+fresh start), ResumableDownloader.resume()/abort()/_maybeRecoverSlowStream/_recoverSlowStream, _pausedDownloaders map + all refs, /comfy/models/download/pause + /resume routes, /engine/pause + /engine/resume routes (no frontend caller), SLOW_RECONNECT_* consts, NDH resume:true option, frontend downloadService.pause()/resume() + SSE download:paused/resumed listeners, MpiModelManager Pause/Resume buttons + download:resumed listener, events.js docs. KEPT: NDH (downloads everything), .part/.cubricdl markers (download plumbing not resume), cancel() -> NDH stop()+remove, 'paused' defensive guard in isActiveDownload. Net -242 lines across 4 files. Verified: all 3 files node --check OK; module loads + instantiates (resume/abort undefined); router introspection confirms pause/resume routes GONE, cancel/start present. NEEDS SERVER RESTART + user live-verify: install a model, confirm no Pause button (Cancel only), cancel mid-download leaves clean state, re-install downloads fresh + verifies.

BUG 2 purge live-CONFIRMED: server probe shows /download/pause + /resume => 404 (removed), install shows Cancel-only (no Pause). TWO follow-ups found live: (a) Cancel 404'd + did nothing. Root: user restarted server mid-install to load the purge -> _modelJobs wiped + download subprocess killed + .part cleaned (verified: no .cubricdl/.part/weight on disk, backend jobs:[]), but renderer kept a phantom 28% job. Old cancel() ignored the 404 -> button no-op. FIX: downloadService.cancel() now treats 404 as orphaned -> clears the local job + emits download:cancelled so the card reverts to Install (no resume means a restart-orphaned install can't recover; clean revert is correct UX). (b) Cancel button was variant:ghost = no border/bg, near-invisible unhovered -> changed to variant:secondary. Both frontend-only (renderer reload). DEFERRED (Bug 3 tail): after uninstalling ILL Anime Beauty, 1% reappeared on ill-anime/ill-anime-beauty/pony-mix. Root: 4x-AnimeSharp (65MB upscaler) on disk, shared by those 3, but NOT owned by any currently-installed model (installed set = sdxl-nsfw/chroma-flash/krea2-turbo-nsfw) so not excluded. SDXL-realistic uses 4x-NMKD (owned by an installed model) so it's clean. FIX DIRECTION: exclude deps SHARED across >=2 model universes (shared library assets), not only installed-owned. Validated: 4x-AnimeSharp in 3 models, 4x-NMKD in 5, each model's own big weight in exactly 1. NOT yet implemented.

ALL bugs resolved + live-verified + committed 8e99fd37. Bug A (handoff's 'download stall') = MISDIAGNOSIS: NDH streams 6.9GB clean+verified (standalone probe 47MB/s; live install completed). The 'stalls' were downstream of the cancel/phantom mess. FIXES: (1) uninstall silent no-op on large files — windows-trash.exe exits 255 when a weight exceeds the drive Recycle Bin QUOTA (not disk free; G: had 37GB free), file survives removed:0 -> trash-first, permanent fs.remove fallback. (2) Cancel didn't stop download + phantom bar + 404 storm — refCount LEAKS up (successful install never decrements it), 2nd install stacked it to 2, cancel saw 1>0 skipped dl.cancel() deleted _modelJobs left NDH streaming -> gate downloader-stop on _otherActiveModelUsesDep (live consumers) not refCount; unknown-job cancel returns idempotent 200 not 404; client _recentlyCancelled guard blocks orphanedActive (MPI-241 SSE-open) resurrection; skip POST when no live job; clear+emit unconditionally. (3) stuck bar after cancel — download:cancelled now _patchTile(modelId) back to Install (awaitReSync's renderList short-circuits on unchanged installed set). (4) phantom partial % — 1GB floor before a bar draws (shared CLIP/VAE alone no longer reads 1-3%). DOC DRIFT found: docs/download-manager.md still documents deleted pause/resume surface (c7313dff removed it).

summary: Archived out of board.columns.done to .agents/mpi-kanban/tasks/_archived/MPI-258/ (workspace preserved intact). mpi-archive run 2026-07-23.
